theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (with futuristic/neon tech accents)
theme_and_archetype.justification: Matches the premium, mysterious cosmic branding requested. Dark void background with glowing gold/orange neon elements highlights the space theme and provides high contrast for glowing Tamil typography.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24), high contrast borders.

grid_modes.features: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) - gap-8, mixing col-span-4 and col-span-8 for planets and constellations.
grid_modes.timeline: Vertical centered line with alternating left/right glass cards, sticky scrolling.
grid_modes.astrology: Control Room Grid (Dense) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 for input forms and result displays.

layout_and_spacing.hero_section: Fullscreen (min-h-screen) with background video, overlay bg-black/60 to ensure text legibility. Large 'MJ' brand text centered.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Glassmorphism (Crystal variant). bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-xl, border border-white/10. Hover: border-orange-500/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,157,0,0.2)].
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 text-white rounded-md transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,157,0,0.4)]. Secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white border border-white/20.
surfaces_and_components.astrology_form: Shadcn UI forms customized with dark glass backgrounds, orange focus rings (focus:ring-orange-500 focus:border-orange-500).
surfaces_and_components.timeline_nodes: Glowing orange dots with white/10 vertical line connecting them.

motion_and_effects.backgrounds: Use CSS or Canvas based animated starfield on absolute positioned layer behind content (no Three.js as requested).
motion_and_effects.scroll: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-up and parallax effects on Space Events and Timeline cards.
motion_and_effects.microinteractions: Hover states on cards translate-y-[-4px] and increase neon border opacity.

hero_dust_overlay.description: Overlay texture to add richness to the hero space vibe

astrology_mandala.description: Background/accent graphic for the Tamil Vedic Astrology Calculator section

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='astrology-submit-btn', data-testid='nav-home-link', data-testid='timeline-event-card'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Google Fonts for 'Arima Madurai' and 'Noto Sans Tamil' in your global css or index.html.
Implement the animated CSS/Canvas starfield as a fixed background covering the viewport (z-index: -1).
Hero section: Use the provided mixkit mp4 video URL for the fullscreen background loop, mute it, auto-play, and apply a black semi-transparent overlay (bg-black/50) so text is readable.
Apply Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) using deep black backgrounds (#030303) and glassmorphic UI elements (bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-xl).
Incorporate orange/gold neon highlights as per the design guidelines for titles, borders, and button hovers.
Use framer-motion for scrolling staggered animations, especially in the interactive timeline and gallery bento grid.
Tamil wording MUST be prominent (primary language).
Do NOT use Three.js for the starfield; strictly use CSS or Canvas API to keep it performant and aligned with user constraints.
Utilize lucide-react for iconography. Install necessary Shadcn components (card, input, button) and override their default white styles to match the dark glassmorphic theme.
Ensure all interactive UI elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
